caption: The video features an elderly man with gray hair, wearing glasses and a blue shirt adorned with bird patterns, standing at a podium in front of an audience. He is holding a book and appears to be reading or speaking from it. The setting seems to be a library or a similar venue, as indicated by the sign on the podium that reads "Kellogg Hubbard Library." The man is engaged and expressive, occasionally looking up from the book to address the audience. The background consists of wooden blinds, and the atmosphere suggests a formal event, possibly a book reading or a lecture. The audience, visible in the foreground, is attentively listening to the speaker. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen.
